briefdescription.para: The initial touch down position.
Creates a new Label.
Called when a property of an object of this type is set.

parameterdescription.para: The object whose property is set.

briefdescription.para: Called to retrieve a property of an object of this type.

parameterdescription.para: The object whose property is to be retrieved.

simplesect.para: The current value of the property.

detaileddescription.para: A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference()

briefdescription.para: LabelImpl constructor.
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.

parameterdescription.para: Available visual (scale-applied) width, or WRAP_CONTENT / MATCH_PARENT.
Available visual (scale-applied) height, or WRAP_CONTENT / MATCH_PARENT.

briefdescription.para: Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Sets the text.

parameterdescription.para: The text to display in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Gets the text.

simplesect.para: The text currently set on the label in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font family of the text.

parameterdescription.para: The requested font family to use.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font family of the text.

simplesect.para: The font family currently set on the label.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font size of the text.
Gets the font size of the text.

simplesect.para: The font size currently set on the label, in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the text should be multi-line.

parameterdescription.para: True for multi-line layout, false for single-line layout.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the text should be multi-line.

simplesect.para: True if multi-line layout is enabled, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the line wrap mode.

parameterdescription.para: The line wrap mode to apply.

briefdescription.para: Gets the line wrap mode.
Sets the color of the text.
Gets the color of the text.

simplesect.para: The text color currently set on the label.

briefdescription.para: Sets the horizontal alignment of the text within the label.
Gets the horizontal text alignment.
Sets the vertical alignment of the text within the label.
Gets the vertical text alignment.
Sets the overflow mode.
Gets the overflow mode.
Sets the line height of the text.

detaileddescription.para: The interpretation of this value depends on the current LineHeightMode.

listitem.para: If the mode is LineHeightMode::RELATIVE, the line height is calculated as a multiplier of the effective scaled font pixel size: CalculatedLineHeight(px)=fontSize(px)*lineHeight*fontSizeScale
If the mode is LineHeightMode::ABSOLUTE, the value is treated as an absolute line height in pixels. CalculatedLineHeight(px)=lineHeight(px)*fontSizeScale

detaileddescription.para: Setting lineHeight to LINE_HEIGHT_AUTO uses the natural line height derived from the font metrics, regardless of the current LineHeightMode. This behavior is similar to the "Auto" line height option in design tools such as Figma.

simplesect.para: The final line height is clamped to be no smaller than the natural line height derived from the font metrics.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current line height value.

detaileddescription.para: The returned value is interpreted according to the current LineHeightMode.
A value of -1.0f indicates that the natural line height (based on font metrics) is used.

briefdescription.para: Sets how the line height value is interpreted.

detaileddescription.para: - LineHeightMode::RELATIVE: The line height is calculated as a multiplier of the font size.

listitem.para: LineHeightMode::ABSOLUTE: The line height is treated as an absolute pixel value.

detaileddescription.para: The default mode is LineHeightMode::RELATIVE.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current line height mode.
Sets how the layout direction of the text is resolved.

detaileddescription.para: - LayoutDirectionMode::CONTENTS: The layout direction is determined from the text content itself.

listitem.para: LayoutDirectionMode::INHERIT: The layout direction is inherited from the parent view.
LayoutDirectionMode::LOCALE: The layout direction is determined based on the system locale.

parameterdescription.para: The LayoutDirectionMode used to determine the text layout direction.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current layout direction mode.

simplesect.para: The LayoutDirectionMode used to resolve the text layout direction.

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables mark-up processing for the text.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable mark-up parsing, false to render text as plain string.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether mark-up processing is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if mark-up parsing is enabled, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of anchors in the text.

parameterdescription.para: The color to apply to anchors.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of anchors in the text.
Sets the color of anchors when they are clicked.

parameterdescription.para: The color to apply to clicked anchors.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of anchors when they are clicked.
Sets how the marquee animation is triggered.

detaileddescription.para: - MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL: The marquee starts only when StartMarquee() is explicitly called.

listitem.para: MarqueeTriggerPolicy::ON_OVERFLOW: The marquee starts automatically during layout when the text exceeds the available space.

detaileddescription.para: The default policy is MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL.

briefdescription.para: Returns when the marquee animation is triggered.
Sets the marquee speed.

parameterdescription.para: The marquee speed in pixels per second.

briefdescription.para: Returns the marquee speed.

simplesect.para: The marquee speed in pixels per second.

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of complete loops for marquee.
Returns the number of complete loops for marquee.
Sets the amount of time to delay the start of marquee and further loops.
Returns the amount of time to delay the start of marquee and further loops.
Sets the gap before marquee wraps.
Returns the gap before marquee wraps.
Sets the marquee orientation.

detaileddescription.para: Horizontal is applied only for single-line text, and vertical only for multi-line text. The setting is ignored if the text layout does not match the required condition.

briefdescription.para: Returns the marquee orientation.
Sets how the marquee stops.
Returns how the marquee stops.
Sets the font weight.
Returns the font weight.
Sets the font width.
Returns the font width.
Sets the font slant.
Returns the font slant.
Sets the background color behind the text.

detaileddescription.para: The background is rendered behind the glyphs of the text.

briefdescription.para: Gets the background color behind the text.
Clears the text background color.

detaileddescription.para: Disables the text background and removes the previously set color.

briefdescription.para: Sets the underline style.
Clears the underline style.
Sets the shadow style.
Clears the shadow style.
Sets the outline style.
Clears the outline style.
Sets the line-through style.
Clears the line-through style.
Sets the bevel style.
Clears the bevel style.
Clears the text fit configuration.
Sets the font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: The scaled font size is calculated from the current font size multiplied by this scale value.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font size scale.
Sets the minimum font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: If this value is greater than the maximum font size scale, the adjusted font size scale follows this minimum value.

briefdescription.para: Gets the minimum font size scale.
Sets the maximum font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: If this value is less than the minimum font size scale, the adjusted font size scale follows the minimum font size scale.

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum font size scale.
Sets whether the system font size scale is applied.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the system font size scale is combined with the current font size scale before applying the minimum and maximum constraints.

parameterdescription.para: True to apply the system font size scale, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the system font size scale is applied.

simplesect.para: True if the system font size scale is applied, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Returns the font variation axes.
Clears the font variation.

detaileddescription.para: This removes all previously set font variation axes.

briefdescription.para: Registers or retrieves a font variation property for the given axis tag.

detaileddescription.para: If a property with the same tag is already registered, the existing property is reused and its current value is updated.

simplesect.para: The property index associated with the variation tag, or Property::INVALID_INDEX on failure.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the text is rendered as a cutout.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the glyph shapes are cut out from the rendered content instead of being filled with the text color.

parameterdescription.para: True to render the text as a cutout, false to render it normally.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the text is rendered as a cutout.

simplesect.para: True if the text is rendered as a cutout, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the additional spacing between letters in pixels.

detaileddescription.para: Positive values increase the spacing, while negative values reduce it.

parameterdescription.para: The additional letter spacing in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Gets the additional spacing between letters in pixels.

simplesect.para: The additional letter spacing in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Applies a mask effect using the given view.

detaileddescription.para: This helper creates a MaskEffect using the rendered output of the view as the mask source and applies it to the label.
The given view is added as a child of the label and retained internally until ClearMaskEffect() is called.

simplesect.para: Any existing RenderEffect on the label will be replaced.

parameterdescription.para: The view used as the mask source.

briefdescription.para: Clears the mask effect applied to the label.

detaileddescription.para: Removes the internally retained mask view from the label and clears the applied RenderEffect.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the text is rendered asynchronously.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the label automatically requests asynchronous text rendering during relayout as needed.
By default, text is rendered synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable asynchronous text rendering, false to render text synchronously.

simplesect.para: The render result is delivered through Label::AsyncRenderFinishedSignal().

briefdescription.para: Gets whether asynchronous text rendering is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if asynchronous text rendering is enabled, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the render scale of the text.

detaileddescription.para: Renders text by rasterizing glyphs at a larger scale and downscaling the result. This improves rendering quality when the view is visually scaled, by reducing quality loss caused by texture upscaling. The layout size of the view is not affected. Valid only when async rendering is enabled, and the value must be 1.0f or greater.

briefdescription.para: Gets the render scale of the text.
Returns whether the marquee animation is currently running.

simplesect.para: True if the marquee animation is running, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Gets the adjusted font size scale used for rendering.

detaileddescription.para: The adjusted font size scale is resolved after applying the current minimum and maximum font size scale constraints and, if enabled, the system font size scale.
If the minimum font size scale is greater than the maximum font size scale, the minimum font size scale takes precedence and is used as the adjusted scale.

simplesect.para: The adjusted font size scale used for rendering.

briefdescription.para: Starts the marquee animation using the current marquee settings.

detaileddescription.para: The marquee starts only when the orientation matches the current text layout: horizontal for single-line text, and vertical for multi-line text. If the condition is not met, this call has no effect.

simplesect.para: If the trigger policy is MarqueeTriggerPolicy::ON_OVERFLOW, the marquee starts only when the text exceeds the available space.

briefdescription.para: Stops the marquee animation.

detaileddescription.para:
The stopping behavior follows the current MarqueeStopMode:
MarqueeStopMode::IMMEDIATE: Stops the marquee immediately.
MarqueeStopMode::FINISH_LOOP: Continues the animation until the current loop finishes, then stops.
This method works regardless of the current MarqueeTriggerPolicy. It stops the marquee even if the policy is MANUAL or ON_OVERFLOW.

briefdescription.para: Requests asynchronous natural size computation.

detaileddescription.para: This method can be used regardless of whether asynchronous rendering is enabled.
The computed natural size includes the label padding.

simplesect.para: The computed result is delivered through Label::AsyncNaturalSizeComputedSignal().

briefdescription.para: Requests asynchronous height-for-width computation.

detaileddescription.para: This method can be used regardless of whether asynchronous rendering is enabled.
The given width must be the total label width including padding.

parameterdescription.para: The total width used for the computation, including padding.

simplesect.para: The computed result is delivered through Label::AsyncHeightForWidthComputedSignal().

briefdescription.para: Requests asynchronous text rendering with a fixed size.
Requests asynchronous text rendering with a fixed width.
Requests asynchronous text rendering with a fixed height.
Requests asynchronous text rendering within the given constraints.
This signal is emitted when an anchor in the text is clicked.

parameterdescription.para: The view that received the click event.
The href of the clicked anchor.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when asynchronous text rendering is finished.

parameterdescription.para: The view whose async text rendering has completed.
The rendered text width, including padding.
The rendered text height, including padding.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when asynchronous natural size computation is finished.

parameterdescription.para: The view whose async natural size computation has completed.
The computed natural width, including padding.
The computed natural height, including padding.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when asynchronous height-for-width computation is finished.

parameterdescription.para: The view whose async height-for-width computation has completed.
The total width used for the computation, including padding.
The computed height for the given width, including padding.

briefdescription.para: Applies default values from UiConfigManager if initialized.
Sets the UI scale used for text-specific metrics.

detaileddescription.para: This scale is used for text-specific size calculation, such as font size.

simplesect.para: True if the scale was changed, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Gets the UI scale used for text-specific metrics.
Gets the effective padding used for text layout.

detaileddescription.para: The view padding is adjusted by the current text UI scale.

briefdescription.para: Called after the actor has been initialized.
Marks that the text renderer needs to be updated on the next relayout.
Updates the effective line height based on the current LineHeightMode.
Callback function for when the layout is changed.

parameterdescription.para: The actor whose layoutDirection is changed.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for when the locale is changed.
Handles touch interactions for text anchors when mark-up is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The label that received the touch.

simplesect.para: True if the touch event is consumed, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Updates touch interception based on anchor presence.
Initializes marquee based on the current text layout.

parameterdescription.para: The size of the text content excluding padding.
The size of the laid-out text used to compute the initial scroll offset.

briefdescription.para: Updates the marquee state.

detaileddescription.para: Called when properties such as orientation or multiline state change.

briefdescription.para: Enables automatic marquee evaluation.

detaileddescription.para: Clears the suppression state so that marquee can be re-evaluated based on the current layout conditions (e.g., overflow, visibility).

briefdescription.para: Suppresses automatic marquee evaluation.

detaileddescription.para: Prevents marquee from being automatically enabled even if layout conditions (e.g., overflow) are satisfied.

briefdescription.para: Handles marquee behavior when visibility changes.

parameterdescription.para: True to restore the previous marquee state, false to stop the marquee animation.

briefdescription.para: Returns the text scroller, creating it if necessary.
Enables or disables the marquee animation.

detaileddescription.para: Updates the internal marquee state and starts or stops the scrolling accordingly.

parameterdescription.para: True to start the marquee animation, false to stop it.

briefdescription.para: Callback when the visibility of the actor is changed.
Returns the cached effective visibility of the label.

simplesect.para: True if the label is effectively visible.

briefdescription.para: Evaluates whether marquee should run and applies the result.

detaileddescription.para: Enables or disables marquee depending on the current layout and mode.

parameterdescription.para: The size of the text content excluding padding.

briefdescription.para: Prepares layout data required for marquee.

parameterdescription.para: The size of the text content excluding padding.
The laid-out text size used to compute the initial scroll offset.

briefdescription.para: Called when a font variation property changes.
Handles font variation property updates.
Applies the cutout enabled state internally.

detaileddescription.para: This updates the internal rendering state and synchronizes any dependent background or visual configuration required for cutout rendering.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable cutout rendering, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the background of the view is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable the view background, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current background color of the view.

detaileddescription.para: Extracts the color from the view's background visual if available.

simplesect.para: True if a background color was successfully retrieved, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Handles background property changes related to cutout rendering.
Updates dependent rendering state for cutout rendering.

detaileddescription.para: This synchronizes background and visual state after the cutout property has been applied through the property handler.

parameterdescription.para: True if cutout rendering is enabled, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (Text::Async::RequestType requestType, const Vector2 &contentSize, const Extents &padding, Dali::LayoutDirection::Type layoutDirection)
memberdef.name: GetAsyncTextParameters

briefdescription.para: Returns the parameters used for asynchronous text processing.

detaileddescription.para: Collects and returns the text label properties required to perform asynchronous text rendering or size computation.

parameterdescription.para: The content size requested by relayout, excluding padding.

simplesect.para: The parameters for asynchronous text processing.

briefdescription.para: Emits TextFitChanged signal.
Emits AsyncRenderFinished signal.
Emits AsyncNaturalSizeComputed signal.
Emits AsyncHeightForWidthComputed signal.
This is the internal implementation class for Label.
